content.text:
<user_query>
User says they want a different script changed (not repo working tree). Check likely locations for cursor command script for /deploy-fuyao and suggest correct file to edit. Also verify current uncommitted change in working tree and propose safe rollback strategy.
</user_query>

yes. `/deploy-fuyao` is a Cursor command defined outside the repo at `~/.cursor/commands/deploy-fuyao.md`, and it invokes `humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh` on the remote machine, which then launches `humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_train.sh` for execution.

- Correct file to edit for command wiring/UI behavior: `~/.cursor/commands/deploy-fuyao.md` (not the repo, since it is outside `git`).
- Correct file to edit for deploy orchestration behavior in the repo: `humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh` (and only then `humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_train.sh` if you want worker/launcher arg handling changes).
- Verified uncommitted worktree changes are only: `humanoid-gym/humanoid/algo/amp_ppo/amp_on_policy_runner.py`, `humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh`, `humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_train.sh`, plus untracked `hyperparameter-suggestion.md`.
- Safe rollback strategy:
  - Backup first: `git stash push -u -m "pre-rollback backup"` (can recover with `git stash pop`).
  - Roll back tracked repo edits: `git restore --source=HEAD -- humanoid-gym/humanoid/algo/amp_ppo/amp_on_policy_runner.py humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_deploy.sh humanoid-gym/scripts/fuyao_train.sh`.
  - Remove untracked file only if desired: `git clean --force -- hyperparameter-suggestion.md`.
  - If editing `~/.cursor/commands/deploy-fuyao.md`, keep a manual backup copy before editing since it is outside git version control.

done
